title: 只係一份免費 BAFS (英文版 Paper 2A - Accounting Module) Mock

replies.msg:
之前(其實係琴日)送左1份Reading Mock (連結: https://lihkg.com/thread/753510/page/1)，宜家再送多一份Mock。但係今次送份BAFS Paper 2A 既 mock。

下載左落黎既話，唔該留翻個Like支持下我。

溫馨提示: Section C 第9條比第8題難好多。如果對自己BAFS既信心唔大既話，可以考慮做左第8條先。

下載連結 (共2個) :

(1) Paper 2A Question Paper

https://www.dropbox.com/s/a7bo92w2z87htbs/%5BMock%201%5D%20HKDSE%20English%20Paper%201%20Part%20A%20RP.pdf?dl=0

(2) Paper 2A Marking Scheme

https://www.dropbox.com/s/1l4qdmrrt5onyfu/%5BMock%201%5D%20HKDSE%20English%20Paper%201%20Part%20A%20QA.pdf?dl=0

_________________________________________

如果反應良好，稍後可能會繼續發放免費學習資源。
_________________________________________
